articles.title: Sarah J Maas Writes Two New Fantasy Books
articles.summary: Sarah J Maas is a famous author who writes fantasy and romance books. She has sold over 75 million books around the world. She just announced two new books in her A Court of Thorns and Roses series. The books will come out in October this year and in January 2027. She talked about this on a podcast called Call Her Daddy. Sarah said the story is very big and has four parts across three books. She wants readers to see it as one big story, not separate books. She hasn't released a book since 2021, so this is exciting for fans. Her books are popular on TikTok, where people talk about them. She also writes other series like Throne of Glass and Crescent City.

articles.title: Emma Raducanu's New Coaching Plan
articles.summary: Emma Raducanu is a famous tennis player from Britain who won a big tournament called the US Open in 2021. She is ranked 24th in the world, which is her best ranking since 2022. Right now, she is playing at Indian Wells in California. Emma wants to get back to playing tennis in her natural way because she feels that too many coaches have told her how to play, and it didn't always work for her. She is not sure about having one full-time coach because she worries they will be watched too closely by others, and she might feel pressured to stay with them even if it's not right. Instead, she plans to 'tap into a few people' for help, which means she will ask different coaches for advice without making them her main coach. Mark Petchey is one person she is working with, and he helps her when he can. Emma hopes this new approach will help her play better and feel more confident on the court.

articles.title: Lola Young Returns to Singing After a Break
articles.summary: Lola Young is a singer who took a break from performing to work on herself after she collapsed on stage last September. She recently played her first headline show in five months in London, showing she is back and stronger. Lola has had some tough times, including struggles with addiction and mental health, but she is now focusing on her music. Her song 'Messy' became a big hit worldwide, and she has won awards like a Grammy. She performed at the London Palladium and will sing at other events soon. Lola told her fans she hopes for a second chance, and they cheered for her return.

articles.title: A New Author Wins a Big Book Prize for a Story About Families
articles.summary: Claire Lynch is a new author who wrote a book called A Family Matter. She won a big prize called the Nero Book Awards. Her book is about a mother who disappears from her family. It was inspired by true stories from the 1980s when some mothers lost their children in court because of their identity. The judges liked the book because it is easy to read and smart. They said it has funny parts and tells a good story. Claire Lynch is also a teacher at a university. She did research by looking at old court papers and news articles to make her story real. This is the first time a new author has won this prize since 2013.

articles.title: Harry Styles Talks About His Friend Liam Payne
articles.summary: Harry Styles is a famous singer who was in a band called One Direction with his friend Liam Payne. Liam died in 2024, and Harry feels very sad about it. He says losing a friend who is like you is hard. Harry is making a new album, and Liam's death made him think about his life. He wants to live his life fully to honor Liam. Harry and Liam became stars together on a TV show called The X Factor. The band stopped in 2016, but they all met at Liam's funeral. Harry finds it tough to talk about Liam's death because Liam was a special person. Harry took a break from music but is now back with a new song.

articles.title: AI Helps Find a Rare Disease by Looking at Hand Photos
articles.summary: Scientists at Kobe University have made a smart computer program that can spot a rare disease called acromegaly just by looking at pictures of the back of the hand and a clenched fist. Acromegaly happens when the body makes too much growth hormone, which makes hands and feet grow bigger over many years. It can be hard to notice early, but if not treated, it can cause serious health problems. The AI uses hand photos instead of face photos to protect people's privacy. It was tested with over 11,000 images from 725 patients in Japan and worked very well, even better than some doctors. This tool could help doctors find the disease faster and help people in areas with fewer doctors get care sooner. The researchers hope to use it for other diseases that change how hands look, like arthritis.
